chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1848 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of main case 19-01-2022 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Shahriyar I.Awan, Assistant Advocate General ******* Pursuant to issuance of notices, comments have been filed and the Counsel for the Petitioner has referred to the comments of the Respondent No.4 as well as Minutes of the meeting dated 11.03.2021 of the Scrutiny Committee held on 05.03.2021, wherein the name of the Petitioner has been recommended by the Committee for appointment under ‘Deceased Quota’. On the other hand, learned Assistant A.G has referred to the comments file on behalf of the AIGP (Legal)-III for Inspector General of Police Sindh, Karachi, wherein a letter dated 05.11.2021 has been relied upon. As per learned AAG, name of the Petitioner is available in the list of persons to be appointed on ‘Deceased Quota’; however, same has to be done under Sindh Police Shaheed, Deceased, Invalidated or Incapacitated Quota Recruitment Rules-2021 notified through Notification dated 23.08.2021. In view of such position, this Petition is disposed of with the observations that as and when the recruitment process is initiated, the Petitioner shall apply and his case be decided in accordance with law and the aforesaid Rules. With these observations, instant Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
